story.introduction: 🌟 Welcome to uDOS, mysterious wanderer! As a Ghost, you have access to a safe demonstration environment where you can explore without affecting the main system.
story.context: Ghost users experience uDOS through guided demos and tutorials. Your actions are sandboxed for learning.
story.purpose: Introduce basic concepts and demonstrate core functionality

variables.name: TUTORIAL-PREFERENCE
variables.prompt: How do you prefer to learn new systems?
variables.help: Guided: Step-by-step tutorials, Experimental: Try things yourself, Reference: Documentation focus

variables.name: DEMO-DURATION
variables.prompt: How long do you plan to explore today?
variables.help: This helps us suggest appropriate activities for your session

variables.name: INTEREST-AREA
variables.prompt: What aspect of uDOS interests you most?
variables.help: We'll customize demonstrations based on your interests
